per_question.question: У какой команды самый высокий done_total?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, AVG(done_total) AS avg_done_total FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics GROUP BY feature_teams ORDER BY avg_done_total DESC LIMIT 1;

per_question.question: У какой команды самый большой scope drop?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, AVG(scope_drop) AS avg_scope_drop FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics GROUP BY feature_teams ORDER BY avg_scope_drop DESC LIMIT 1;

per_question.question: Топ-3 команды по количеству задач
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, COUNT(*) as task_count FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics GROUP BY feature_teams ORDER BY task_count DESC LIMIT 3

per_question.question: Покажи scope drop команды cthulhu и их задачи со статусом Cancelled
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT r.feature_teams, r.scope_drop, d.issue_status_act FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics r JOIN report_agile_dashboard d ON r.feature_teams = d.feature_teams AND r.jirasprint_id = d.jirasprint_id WHERE r.feature_teams ILIKE '%%cthulhu%%' AND d.issue_status_act = 'Cancelled'

per_question.question: Средний scope drop у команды shopping cart
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, AVG(scope_drop) FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics WHERE feature_teams ILIKE '%%shopping cart%%' GROUP BY feature_teams
